title: Rajat submission
author: Rajat123456789
architecture: Transformer (custom with LeakyReLU, U-Net skip connections, Grouped Query Attention, partial RoPE, Cross-Self Attention, BigramHash embedding, RMSNorm, parameter banking)
quantization: mixed int6/int8 with Full GPTQ and GPTQ-lite fallback

data.method: Full GPTQ int6 with Hessian-guided column-by-column error compensation and GPTQ-lite int6 fallback
data.scope: attention and MLP weights (Full GPTQ), output projections and MLP down-projections (GPTQ-lite), embeddings and small tensors (int8)

data.component: LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation, U-Net skip connections, Grouped Query Attention with partial RoPE, Cross-Self Attention (XSA), BigramHash embedding, RMSNorm with learnable scale, parameter banking
data.description: Custom Transformer variant with advanced attention and embedding mechanisms

data.method: Entropy-coded compression (Huffman + LZMA or fallback to plain LZMA)
sliding window with legal score-first TTT protocol

compression: Entropy-coded compression (Huffman + LZMA or plain LZMA fallback)
novel_contributions: Full GPTQ Quantization with Hessian-guided column-by-column error compensation replacing GPTQ-lite clip search
Soft-Round QAT using differentiable soft-rounding with tanh-based smooth approximation and temperature annealing
LoRA-Based Test-Time Training with low-rank adapters (rank-8, α=16) on Q/K/V/O projections trained with AdamW to prevent catastrophic forgetting
Entropy-Coded Compression using Huffman coding pre-pass before LZMA with automatic fallback to plain LZMA
